description: ESLint configuration file that uses the @eslint/eslintrc FlatCompat utility to extend specific ESLint configurations for a Next.js project.

methods.name: __filename
methods.description: Full path of the current file generated using fileURLToPath.

methods.name: __dirname
methods.description: Directory name of the current file, derived from __filename.

methods.name: compat.extends
methods.description: Method to extend base ESLint configurations using specified presets.
